rule: Preserve existing routes, APIs, tables, buttons, admin settings, reports and workflows; enhance through compliance layers.

features.name: Public ERP marketing website

features.name: Authentication and login
features.strategy: enhance with JWT refresh, 2FA, device tracking and super-admin separation

features.name: Application shell and SAHL-style navigation
features.strategy: preserve; enhance with Master Control, scrollable sidebar and role-aware navigation

features.name: Country detection and localization
features.strategy: enhance; legal tax country remains company/branch/admin confirmed

features.name: Accounting
features.strategy: enhance with bank reconciliation, fixed assets, closing, consolidated reports and country COA templates

features.name: Sales and invoicing
features.strategy: enhance with universal invoice engine, delivery notes, recurring invoices, payments, reminders and portals

features.name: Saudi VAT and ZATCA readiness
features.strategy: enhance to certified Phase 2 connector: CSID, PCSID, signing, clearance/reporting, PDF/A-3, archive

features.name: Pakistan FBR readiness
features.strategy: enhance with real FBR JSON schema, IRN, UUID, QR, retry queue and province taxes

features.name: UAE VAT readiness
features.strategy: enhance with TRN validation, VAT return workflow, reverse charge, zero-rated/exempt flows

features.name: POS
features.strategy: enhance with offline sync, thermal print templates, Saudi QR receipts and device integrations

features.name: Inventory and warehouse
features.strategy: enhance with valuation, serial/batch depth, bins, cycle counts, reorder automation

features.name: Purchase and suppliers
features.strategy: enhance with RFQ, comparison, landed cost and three-way matching

features.name: CRM
features.strategy: enhance with scoring, automation, territories, campaigns and customer portal

features.name: HR and payroll
features.strategy: enhance with Saudi GOSI/WPS, Pakistan EOBI/SESSI, UAE gratuity and payroll posting

features.name: Manufacturing
features.strategy: enhance with MRP, routing, shop floor, quality, scrap and costing

features.name: Projects
features.strategy: enhance with Gantt, billing, project P&L and resource planning

features.name: Helpdesk
features.strategy: enhance with SLA, email/WhatsApp-to-ticket, escalation and CSAT

features.name: Master Control
features.strategy: preserve; use as implementation control board for remaining roadmap
